mapper.select:
SELECT /*+ INDEX_DESC(A PPS_USIM_CREATE_IDX1) */ CR_SEQ, USIM_MODEL, START_SN, END_SN, FN_GET_USRNM(CR_ADMIN) AS CR_ADMIN_NM, CR_ADMIN, TO_CHAR(CR_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') CR_DATE, CR_PRICE, USIM_CNT, CANCEL_FLAG, TO_CHAR(CANCEL_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') CANCEL_DATE, FN_GET_USRNM(CANCEL_ADMIN) AS CANCEL_ADMIN_NM, CANCEL_ADMIN, REMARK FROM PPS_USIM_CREATE A WHERE CR_DATE > TO_DATE('2015-01-01','YYYY-MM-DD')
AND REMARK LIKE '%' || #{searchNm} || '%'
AND CR_SEQ = #{searchNm}
AND CR_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{startDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND CR_DATE < TO_DATE(#{endDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')+1
AND CANCEL_FLAG = 'Y'
AND (CANCEL_FLAG = 'N' OR CANCEL_FLAG IS NULL)
AND USIM_MODEL = #{searchUsimSnHeader}
AND END_SN >= LPAD(#{searchUsimSnStart}, 7, '0')
AND( (START_SN BETWEEN LPAD(#{searchUsimSnStart}, 7, '0') AND LPAD(#{searchUsimSnEnd}, 7, '0')) OR (END_SN BETWEEN LPAD(#{searchUsimSnStart}, 7, '0') AND LPAD(#{searchUsimSnEnd}, 7, '0')) OR ( START_SN <= LPAD(#{searchUsimSnEnd}, 7, '0') AND END_SN >= LPAD(#{searchUsimSnStart}, 7, '0')))
AND START_SN <= LPAD(#{searchUsimSnEnd}, 7, '0')
AND USIM_CNT = (SELECT COUNT(A.USIM_CNT) FROM PPS_USIM_INFO B WHERE B.CR_SEQ = A.CR_SEQ AND B.STATUS='CR')

SELECT /*+ INDEX_DESC(A PPS_USIM_CREATE_IDX1) */ CR_SEQ, USIM_MODEL, START_SN, END_SN, FN_GET_USRNM(CR_ADMIN) AS CR_ADMIN_NM, CR_ADMIN, TO_CHAR(CR_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') CR_DATE, CR_PRICE, USIM_CNT, CANCEL_FLAG, TO_CHAR(CANCEL_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') CANCEL_DATE, FN_GET_USRNM(CANCEL_ADMIN) AS CANCEL_ADMIN_NM, CANCEL_ADMIN, REMARK FROM PPS_USIM_CREATE A WHERE CR_DATE > TO_DATE('2015-01-01','YYYY-MM-DD')
AND REMARK LIKE '%' || #{searchNm} || '%'
AND CR_SEQ = #{searchNm}
AND CR_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{startDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND CR_DATE < TO_DATE(#{endDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')+1
AND CANCEL_FLAG = 'Y'
AND (CANCEL_FLAG = 'N' OR CANCEL_FLAG IS NULL)
AND USIM_MODEL = #{searchUsimSnHeader}
AND END_SN >= LPAD(#{searchUsimSnStart}, 7, '0')
AND( (START_SN BETWEEN LPAD(#{searchUsimSnStart}, 7, '0') AND LPAD(#{searchUsimSnEnd}, 7, '0')) OR (END_SN BETWEEN LPAD(#{searchUsimSnStart}, 7, '0') AND LPAD(#{searchUsimSnEnd}, 7, '0')) OR ( START_SN <= LPAD(#{searchUsimSnEnd}, 7, '0') AND END_SN >= LPAD(#{searchUsimSnStart}, 7, '0')))
AND START_SN <= LPAD(#{searchUsimSnEnd}, 7, '0')
AND USIM_CNT = (SELECT COUNT(A.USIM_CNT) FROM PPS_USIM_INFO B WHERE B.CR_SEQ = A.CR_SEQ AND B.STATUS='CR')

SELECT /*+ INDEX_DESC(A PPS_USIM_OUT_IDX1) */ OUT_SEQ, USIM_MODEL, START_SN, END_SN, FN_GET_USRNM(OUT_ADMIN) AS OUT_ADMIN_NM, OUT_ADMIN, TO_CHAR(OUT_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') OUT_DATE, F_GET_AGENT_NM(OUT_AGENT) OUT_AGENT_NM, OUT_AGENT, USIM_CNT, OUT_PRICE, CANCEL_FLAG, TO_CHAR(CANCEL_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') CANCEL_DATE, FN_GET_USRNM(CANCEL_ADMIN) AS CANCEL_ADMIN_NM, CANCEL_ADMIN, REMARK FROM PPS_USIM_OUT A WHERE OUT_DATE > TO_DATE('2015-01-01','YYYY-MM-DD')
AND REMARK LIKE '%' || #{searchNm} || '%'
AND OUT_SEQ = #{searchNm}
AND OUT_AGENT = #{searchAgentNm}
AND OUT_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{startDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND OUT_DATE < TO_DATE(#{endDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')+1
AND CANCEL_FLAG = 'Y'
AND (CANCEL_FLAG = 'N' OR CANCEL_FLAG IS NULL)
AND USIM_MODEL = #{searchUsimSnHeader}
AND END_SN >= LPAD(#{searchUsimSnStart}, 7, '0')
AND( (START_SN BETWEEN LPAD(#{searchUsimSnStart}, 7, '0') AND LPAD(#{searchUsimSnEnd}, 7, '0')) OR (END_SN BETWEEN LPAD(#{searchUsimSnStart}, 7, '0') AND LPAD(#{searchUsimSnEnd}, 7, '0')) OR ( START_SN <= LPAD(#{searchUsimSnEnd}, 7, '0') AND END_SN >= LPAD(#{searchUsimSnStart}, 7, '0')))
AND START_SN <= LPAD(#{searchUsimSnEnd}, 7, '0')
AND USIM_CNT = (SELECT COUNT(A.USIM_CNT) FROM PPS_USIM_INFO B WHERE B.OUT_SEQ = A.OUT_SEQ AND B.STATUS='OT')

SELECT /*+ INDEX_DESC(A PPS_USIM_OUT_IDX1) */ OUT_SEQ, USIM_MODEL, START_SN, END_SN, FN_GET_USRNM(OUT_ADMIN) AS OUT_ADMIN_NM, OUT_ADMIN, TO_CHAR(OUT_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') OUT_DATE, F_GET_AGENT_NM(OUT_AGENT) OUT_AGENT_NM, OUT_AGENT, USIM_CNT, OUT_PRICE, CANCEL_FLAG, TO_CHAR(CANCEL_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') CANCEL_DATE, FN_GET_USRNM(CANCEL_ADMIN) AS CANCEL_ADMIN_NM, CANCEL_ADMIN, REMARK FROM PPS_USIM_OUT A WHERE OUT_DATE > TO_DATE('2015-01-01','YYYY-MM-DD')
AND REMARK LIKE '%' || #{searchNm} || '%'
AND OUT_SEQ = #{searchNm}
AND OUT_AGENT = #{searchAgentNm}
AND OUT_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{startDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND OUT_DATE < TO_DATE(#{endDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')+1
AND CANCEL_FLAG = 'Y'
AND (CANCEL_FLAG = 'N' OR CANCEL_FLAG IS NULL)
AND USIM_MODEL = #{searchUsimSnHeader}
AND END_SN >= LPAD(#{searchUsimSnStart}, 7, '0')
AND( (START_SN BETWEEN LPAD(#{searchUsimSnStart}, 7, '0') AND LPAD(#{searchUsimSnEnd}, 7, '0')) OR (END_SN BETWEEN LPAD(#{searchUsimSnStart}, 7, '0') AND LPAD(#{searchUsimSnEnd}, 7, '0')) OR ( START_SN <= LPAD(#{searchUsimSnEnd}, 7, '0') AND END_SN >= LPAD(#{searchUsimSnStart}, 7, '0')))
AND START_SN <= LPAD(#{searchUsimSnEnd}, 7, '0')
AND USIM_CNT = (SELECT COUNT(A.USIM_CNT) FROM PPS_USIM_INFO B WHERE B.OUT_SEQ = A.OUT_SEQ AND B.STATUS='OT')

SELECT TELCO_CD as telcoCd, USIM_MODEL as usimModel, SN as sn, USIM_SN as usimSn, STATUS as status, F_GET_KT_CODE_NM('PPS_USIM_INFO', 'STATUS', STATUS) as statusNm, CR_SEQ as crSeq, CR_PRICE as crPrice, TO_CHAR(CR_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as crDate, FN_GET_USRNM(CR_ADMIN) AS crAdmin, OUT_FLAG as outFlag, OUT_SEQ as outSeq, TO_CHAR(OUT_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as outDate, F_GET_AGENT_NM(OUT_AGENT) outAgent, FN_GET_USRNM(OUT_ADMIN) AS outAdmin, OPEN_FLAG as openFlag, TO_CHAR(OPEN_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as openDate, CONTRACT_NUM as contractNum, BACK_FLAG as backFlag, BACK_SEQ as backSeq, TO_CHAR(BACK_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as backDate, FN_GET_USRNM(BACK_ADMIN) AS backAdmin, REMARK as remark FROM PPS_USIM_INFO WHERE SN=#{sn} AND USIM_MODEL=#{usimModel}
SELECT USIM_MODEL AS value, USIM_MODEL AS text FROM PPS_CODE_USIM_MODEL WHERE 1=1 ORDER BY USIM_MODEL

SELECT /*+ INDEX_DESC(A PPS_USIM_INFO_IDX1) */ TELCO_CD, USIM_MODEL, SN, USIM_SN, USIM_MODEL||SN USIM_FULL_SN, STATUS, F_GET_KT_CODE_NM('PPS_USIM_INFO', 'STATUS', STATUS) STATUS_NM, CR_SEQ, CR_PRICE, TO_CHAR(CR_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') CR_DATE, FN_GET_USRNM(CR_ADMIN) AS CR_ADMIN_NM, CR_ADMIN, OUT_FLAG, OUT_SEQ, TO_CHAR(OUT_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') OUT_DATE, F_GET_AGENT_NM(OUT_AGENT) OUT_AGENT_NM, OUT_AGENT, FN_GET_USRNM(OUT_ADMIN) AS OUT_ADMIN_NM, OUT_ADMIN, OPEN_FLAG, TO_CHAR(OPEN_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') OPEN_DATE, CONTRACT_NUM, BACK_FLAG, BACK_SEQ, TO_CHAR(BACK_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') BACK_DATE, FN_GET_USRNM(BACK_ADMIN) AS BACK_ADMIN_NM, BACK_ADMIN, REMARK FROM PPS_USIM_INFO A WHERE CR_DATE > TO_DATE('20150101', 'YYYYMMDD')
AND REMARK LIKE '%' || #{searchNm} || '%'
AND CR_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{startDtCreate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND CR_DATE < TO_DATE(#{endDtCreate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')+1
AND OUT_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{startDtOut}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND OUT_DATE < TO_DATE(#{endDtOut}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')+1
AND BACK_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{startDtBack}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND BACK_DATE < TO_DATE(#{endDtBack}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')+1
AND STATUS = 'CR'
AND STATUS = 'OT'
AND OUT_AGENT = #{searchAgentNm}
AND USIM_MODEL LIKE #{searchUsimSnHeader}
AND SN >= LPAD(#{searchUsimSnStart}, 7, '0')
AND SN <= LPAD(#{searchUsimSnEnd}, 7, '0')
